_note: PHASE 2 - CONTROL LIVE, single isolated proof (evade -> evade swap). LogOnly=false, MaxWrites=1. ONLY acts on a natural SHIELD-BLOCK (MatchEvadeType=0x03) and rewrites its evade-type to CLASS-EVADE/dodge (ForceEvadeType=0x04). Chosen because: (1) the player reliably reproduces a shield parry via Agrias->Ramza; (2) a natural evade already has +1C4=0, so NO damage-path coordination is needed - this isolates the animation lever (only +0x1C0 and the cl argument change); (3) shield-block (raise shield) vs class-evade (sidestep dodge) are visually distinct, and the dodge needs no equipment to render. Expected: the FIRST time the target would shield-block, the on-screen animation renders as a dodge instead, and the log shows [CONTROL WROTE evadeType=0x04(class-evade)]; then MaxWrites=1 stops it (subsequent blocks render normally as 0x03). Method: Agrias attacks Ramza front-on until Ramza blocks once. If 0x04 renders oddly, fall back to ForceEvadeType=6 (plain miss) or 2 (weapon parry). Safe: one write, one outcome, no HP change (it was already a no-damage evade). REQUIRES a fresh game launch so the hook rebuilds with the live values.
